steps.title: Identify opposite and hypotenuse
steps.content: In the right triangle, side $SR$ has length $22$. From angle $Q$, side $SR$ is opposite and side $QS$ is the hypotenuse.

steps.title: Use the sine ratio
steps.content:
The sine ratio is opposite over hypotenuse:
$$\sin Q=\frac{22}{QS}$$Solve for $QS$:
$$QS=\frac{22}{\sin Q}$$The answer is D.
